function: Class B G protein-coupled receptor involved in glucose-dependent insulin secretion.
Receptor mediating insulinotropic effects of glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide.
Renal glucose reabsorption transporter targeted by SGLT2 inhibitors.
Cell-surface serine protease that degrades incretin hormones and is inhibited by DPP-4 inhibitors.
Nuclear receptor regulating adipocyte differentiation and insulin sensitivity, targeted by thiazolidinediones.
Receptor tyrosine kinase mediating the metabolic and mitogenic effects of insulin analogues.
Sulfonylurea receptor component of the pancreatic beta-cell KATP channel targeted by sulfonylureas and meglitinides.
